positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration featuring a whimsical forest scene. The composition is centered and highly stylized, showing silhouetted forest animals (like a stag, fox, and deer) interacting with abstracted geometric plants and oversized mushrooms. The style must be a clean, single-color linocut woodblock print aesthetic, using deep forest green and burnt orange on an off-white background. The line work must be crisp and bold, emphasizing strong contrasts and clear negative space, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Flat vector illustration quality, highly symmetrical composition, graphic design, centered view, volumetric light source.
